interface.name: PS_CreateInmateBooking
interface.description: Form interface for creating new Inmate Bookings as an action
interface.definition: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_formLayout_v2"( titleBar: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_headerTemplateFull"( title: "Create Inmate Booking", secondaryText: "Enter details for the inmate booking" ), isTitleBarFixed: true, contents: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( showWhen: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "DESKTOP_WIDE", "DESKTOP", "DESKTOP_NARROW", "TABLET_LANDSCAPE" } ) ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( width: "WIDE", contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sectionLayout_v1"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_cardLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_dateField"( label: "Booking Date", labelPosition: "ABOVE", required: true, value:
